settings.title: Loved by Our Customers
settings.review_1_text: This vacuum delivers everything it promises to. It is lighter than my previous Dyson which was quite heavy and uncomfortable by comparison it’s very powerful and an all round great buy.
settings.review_2_text: I purchased as a gift for my daughter in law. She loves it!
settings.review_3_text: I love it. It does a great job picking up the cat and dog hair off the floor. The light on the front helps see the hair and dirt. It's is worth every penny. Thanks
